text: Bitcoin is holding steady near $60k with modest gains, while Ethereum is outpacing it with a 3.1% jump, suggesting selective strength in smart contract assets despite widespread fear. The Fear & Greed Index at 12 (Extreme Fear) and deteriorating 7-day trend indicates market participants are deeply pessimistic, yet $86B in daily volume shows liquidity remains engaged rather than frozen. Bitcoin's 55.6% dominance is stable, meaning capital isn't aggressively rotating to alts, consistent with a defensive posture during uncertainty.
